source.videoTitle: 16th July 2026 Current Affairs🔥 | Daily MCQs | Today’s Most Important MCQs #currentaffairs2026

summary: The study material of 16th July 2026 covers several significant domestic and international developments. Domestically, the Indian Grey Hornbill has returned to Gujarat's Gir National Park after 60 years of local extinction under a species recovery programme. Additionally, the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) has released the second edition of the Digital Threat Report to strengthen cyber security in the Banking, Financial Services, Insurance (BFSI) and payment ecosystem. Karnataka has announced the establishment of India's first government-driven Artificial Intelligence University, and the official mascot 'Peacock' was unveiled for the 2026 Commonwealth Table Tennis Championship in Delhi. Internationally, Ukraine and nine other European nations launched the Integrated Antiballistic Missile Coalition, while India is gearing up to host the fifth meeting of BIMSTEC National Security Chiefs in New Delhi.
keyFacts: Indian Grey Hornbill has successfully returned to Gir National Park, Gujarat, after more than 60 years of local extinction.
MeitY released the second edition of the Digital Threat Report 2025-26 targeting BFSI cyber security.
Tamil poet and lyricist R. Vairamuthu has been conferred the 60th Jnanpith Award (for 2025), becoming the third Tamil writer to receive it.
Karnataka is setting up India's first government-driven Artificial Intelligence University.
Ukraine, along with nine other European countries, launched the Integrated Antiballistic Missile Coalition.
The Uttar Pradesh Pharmacy Council became the first State Pharmacy Council to collaborate with the Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission (IPC) to promote the National Formulary of India.
The India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement came into force on 15th July 2026.

mcqs.question: The Indian Grey Hornbill has recently returned after more than 60 years of local extinction to which of the following protected areas?
mcqs.explanation: The Indian Grey Hornbill has successfully returned to Gir National Park in Gujarat after being locally extinct for over 60 years, following a species recovery programme by the Gujarat Forest Department.

mcqs.question: Which specific sector is the primary focus of the recently released 'Digital Threat Report 2025 & 26'?

options.a: Agricultural Supply Chain and Food Storage Systems
options.b: Banking, Financial Services, Insurance (BFSI) and Payment Ecosystem

mcqs.explanation: The second edition of the Digital Threat Report 2025 & 26 primarily focuses on strengthening cyber security in the Banking, Financial Services, Insurance (BFSI) and payment ecosystem by identifying AI-driven attacks, ransomware, and payment fraud.

mcqs.question: Who has been conferred the 60th Jnanpith Award 2025, becoming the third Tamil writer to receive this prestigious literary honor?
mcqs.explanation: Tamil poet and lyricist R. Vairamuthu was conferred the 60th Jnanpith Award 2025 for his outstanding contribution to Tamil literature, making him the third Tamil writer and the first Tamil poet to receive this honour.

mcqs.question: Ukraine, along with how many other European countries, launched the newly announced Integrated Antiballistic Missile Coalition in 2026?
mcqs.explanation: Ukraine, in collaboration with nine other European countries, launched the Integrated Antiballistic Missile Coalition to develop a shared, purely defensive antiballistic missile shield to protect Europe.

mcqs.question: Which Indian state has announced the establishment of India's first government-driven Artificial Intelligence (AI) University?
mcqs.explanation: Karnataka Deputy CM D.K. Shivakumar announced the establishment of India's first government-driven Artificial Intelligence University during the Google I/O Connect India 2026 event in Bengaluru.

mcqs.question: The Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission (IPC) signed an MoU with which State Pharmacy Council to promote the National Formulary of India, making it the first state council to do so?
mcqs.explanation: The Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission (IPC) signed an MoU with the Uttar Pradesh Pharmacy Council to promote the National Formulary of India and ensure rational use of medicines, making UP the first state pharmacy council to partner for this initiative.

mcqs.question: On which date did the India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement officially come into action/enforcement?
mcqs.explanation: The India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement came into force on 15th July 2026, aimed at boosting trade, investment, and economic cooperation.

mcqs.question: Which city is set to host the fifth meeting of the BIMSTEC National Security Chiefs?
mcqs.explanation: India is set to host the fifth meeting of the BIMSTEC National Security Chiefs in New Delhi.

mcqs.question: What is the theme for the World Youth Skills Day celebrated on 15th July 2026?

options.c: Learning for People, Planet, and Prosperity

mcqs.explanation: World Youth Skills Day is observed every year on 15th July. The theme for the year 2026 is 'Skills for a Shared Future'.

mcqs.question: The 'Nidar 2.0' scheme, recently launched by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), aims to build indigenous drones using which processor?
mcqs.explanation: Under the Nidar 2.0 initiative launched by MeitY, indigenous drones will be developed using the indigenously designed Vega processor.

mcqs.question: Which space technology firm became the first company to receive investment from India's newly established Sovereign Space Tech Fund (Space Venture Capital)?
mcqs.explanation: Dhruva Space has become the first private space company to receive investment from India's Sovereign Space Tech Fund, known as the Space Venture Capital fund.

mcqs.question: What is the official mascot of the 2026 Commonwealth Table Tennis Championship to be held in New Delhi?
mcqs.explanation: The official mascot of the 2026 Commonwealth Table Tennis Championship is the Peacock (Mayur), inspired by India's national bird. The event is scheduled to be held in Delhi.
